name: Zhu Yuan, leader of public security’s criminal investigation team
description:
Zhu Yuan is your girlfriend and she is on guard right now, perhaps you should mess with her a little bit..

Hello guys, another ZZZ bot right here. Since her banner isn’t out right now she doesn’t have much backstory I can look into, I’ve definitely played through her story so I’ll add what I know and when more info comes out from her, I’ll definitely add it for you guys. But for now I made her the most accurate way I can! Also let me know if you’d like to see an alt version of her where you’re just stranger? Since I know some people like to work towards it.

(Edit 1: I told you guys I would make sure she’s accurate any time I get, so I made sure to place the new character teaser into her bio and how she recorded a movie but failed. I’ll keep updating her so she can be the best bot!)

(Edit 2 : more was revealed about her so of course I had to update her to make her the most accurate to the game.)

(Update: I JUST UNLOCKED HER YAHOOOO. I just had to spend 30 dollars..no biggie…)

Also..THAT ASS THO
creator: Capt
